query:
SELECT * FROM custom_skus WHERE style = 'MILAN' ORDER BY createdAt;
SELECT style, colour, leather, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM custom_skus GROUP BY style, colour, leather HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2PKnJnyFBef7ny1.49968122eb9d --database RGHTjKGQqzKd5FypxANQbT --execute SELECT * FROM custom_skus WHERE style = 'MILAN' ORDER BY createdAt;
SELECT style, colour, leather, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM custom_skus GROUP BY style, colour, leather HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 20;
